---
name: Tool Request
description: Suggest a new tool for Boring Tools
title: "[Tool Request]: <tool_name>"
labels: ["tool request"]
assignees: ""
---

## Tool Request

Please provide the following details to help us evaluate your tool suggestion:

### Tool Name
What would you like to name this tool?

### Problem Being Solved
What specific problem does this tool address? How does it save time or reduce effort?

### Expected Features
What features should this tool include? Please describe the core functionality.

### Optional: Screenshots/References
You can attach screenshots, mockups, or references to similar tools that inspire this idea.

---

*Note: Please search existing tools before submitting to avoid duplicates.*
